
  # Prospect Management for SCS v2

  This is a code bundle for Prospect Management for SCS v2. The original project is available at https://www.figma.com/design/CS1IF2tOv1TbbSqFUD0kLz/Prospect-Management-for-SCS-v2.

  ## Running the code

  Run `npm i` to install the dependencies.

  Run `npm run dev` to start the development server.
